reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya bagus, bersih, nyaman, dan semua pegawainya ramah buat menginap lama enak banget harganya juga terjangkau bagus sekali pokonya nextime mau nginep lagi di sana heheh
reviews.reviewComments: The place is nice, clean, comfortable, and all the staff are friendly. It's very pleasant to stay long, and the price is also affordable. It's really great, definitely next time I want to stay there again, hehe.

reviews.reviewPositives: Good stay before morning trip to Pulau Weh by ferry. Clean spacious room. The restaurant on the rooftop floor is good.
reviews.reviewNegatives: I think it could be slightly cheaper and the bathroom could be better maintained.

reviews.originalComment: Harus bgt kalo ke Banda Aceh wajib nginap disini, lokasinya strategis menurutku. Terus untuk kamar bersih pwol, wangi, nyaman bgt, staff nya juga ramah bgt, pokoknya gak bakal kecewa sih nginap dsni. Kalo ada bintang 10 keknya harus bintang 10 ku kasih. The best ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
reviews.reviewComments: It is a must to stay here when going to Banda Aceh, the location is strategic in my opinion. The rooms are very clean, fragrant, and very comfortable, the staff is also very friendly, you definitely won't be disappointed staying here. If there were 10 stars, I would give it 10 stars. The best ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviews.reviewPositives:
- Not so far from the city centre
- Affordable price
reviews.reviewNegatives:
- Windows are not soundproof
- AC takes a while to cool down the room

reviews.reviewComments:
Staff very polite and helpful
Clean and big room
I think its new hotel
I like it because alfamart just in front of the hotel
And only 5-6 mins to ferry jetty to sabang
They have restaurant at the rooftop
Will come again for sure!

reviews.reviewPositives: Lo amplia que era la habitación y que tuviese desayuno incluido, es muy util alojarse aqui teniendo el ferry cerca
reviews.reviewNegatives: Habia algun pelo en la colcha de la cama que no era nuestro 😐

reviews.originalComment: Semua staf nya ramah2 dan fast respon,lokasi jg dikota,pokoknya puas nginap di fandika hotel
reviews.reviewComments: All the staff are friendly and fast in responding, the location is also in the city, I'm really satisfied staying at Fandika Hotel.

reviews.reviewTitle: Propre et confortable, très proche du port
reviews.reviewPositives: Accueil sympathique, restaurant au Rooftop sur place grande chambre, propre super content de notre séjour ici

reviews.reviewTitle: friendly staff, clean room, okay basically
reviews.originalTitle: staf yang ramah, kamar bersih, oke pkoknya
reviews.originalComment: pelayanan dan stafnya patut diacungi jempol 👍🏼 pertahankan
reviews.reviewComments: The service and its staff deserve a thumbs up 👍🏼 keep it up.

reviews.reviewTitle: Zwischenstopp am Weg nach Pulau Weh
reviews.reviewPositives: Modernes Hotel in der Nähe des Fährterminals, das Personal ist liebevoll und das Frühstück Top!

reviews.originalComment: Kasur nya enak banget. Ngga expect tadinya kasur nya akan enak. Bantal nya aja kurang enak hehehe. Lokasi bagus
reviews.reviewComments: The mattress is really comfortable. I didn't expect the mattress to be this nice. The pillow is just not very comfortable, hehe. Good location.

reviews.reviewPositives:
heel netjes, ruime kamer.
5 min van Port  en warm water met de douche !!
reviews.reviewNegatives: badkamer een beetje karig, maar ook wel weer goed.

reviews.reviewComments:
Plus:
Decent hotel. Good WiFi. Rooftop breakfast view was nice. Breakfast was nice.

Minus:
When you shower, the water pools on the bathroom floor and doesn’t drain very well.

reviews.reviewPositives: Lähellä satamaa, mistä laivat pulau Wehille lähtivät.

reviews.originalComment: staf nya tdk profesional, terganggu dgn privasi tamu ngetok2 pintu nanya sama spa dikamar. padahal itu privasi. terus setelah menanyakam itu listrik kamar mati, dan datang teknisi utk perbaiki dan saya curiga apa ini di sadap atau bagaimana sehingga privasi saya terganggu dgn hal itu. karna kamar saya aja yang mati kamar yg lain tidak mati. saya tdk merekomendasi menginap disni jika utk ingin healing sendirian
reviews.reviewComments: The staff is unprofessional, disturbing the guests' privacy by knocking on the door and asking about the spa in the room. That is a matter of privacy. Then after those inquiries, the electricity in the room went out, and a technician came to fix it, and I suspect whether this is being eavesdropped on or how my privacy is disturbed by that. Because only my room lost power, while the other rooms did not. I do not recommend staying here if you want to heal alone.

reviews.reviewPositives: Hotel i pokój czysty, jedzenie przyzwoite  personel pomocny i bardzo miły, lokalizacja blisko portu.Polecam

reviews.reviewComments: ok

reviews.reviewTitle: Big, clean and comfortable room in convenient location near ferry terminal
reviews.reviewPositives:
Good location close to the ferry terminal
Large and v comfortable room
reviews.reviewNegatives: Breakfast was big, but no menu and limited options (fried rice or noodles)

reviews.reviewComments: Value for money

reviews.reviewPositives: Thé staff were all very helpful and friendly
reviews.reviewNegatives: There’s not much to do in the area around the hotel, but use Maxim ( like Uber) and you can get a car or bike outside in a couple of minutes

reviews.reviewComments: Spacious room, good breakfast
Closed but still appear to book

Recommended.
The hotel very nice, staff friendly. 
The room also just nice.
Best... Bersih dan dekat dengan pelabuhan. Nyaman sekali......
Very clean and has a big room

reviews.originalComment:
TOP BEST Service, Accuracy, Precision & Discipline.

Salam Hospitality , Salam Pariwisata 😉
reviews.reviewComments:
TOP BEST Service, Accuracy, Precision & Discipline.
